<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused; one concern per PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link issues with #123. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New DomainPack
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Kept the **kernel domain-agnostic** (no hard-coded domain lists; safety via tool metadata) — or this PR only touches a pack/app
- [ ] Updated docs / README / CHANGELOG if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or absolute local paths committed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
